subcodes.first_line: The Day is verily the Day of God, and praise and glorification are reserved for the kindred and chosen ones, for they have girded their loins with firm resolve [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یوم یوم الله است و حمد و ثنا مخصوص افنان و اولیاست چه که کمر همت را محکم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc., @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
